items.title: Levi’s is finding new ways to win customers — by looking toward tops and ‘denim luxury’
items.description: Jeans maker raises its full-year outlook for the second straight time, but shares fall after hours

items.title: Higher gas prices aren’t the only way rising tensions with Iran will hit home
items.description: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.

items.title: I started retirement with $3 million. Now I’m 89 and down to $2 million. What if I get sick?
items.description: Even if you’re not worried about your normal spending anymore, a long-term-care need is still a problem for any budget.

items.title: Did you mess up on your taxes? The IRS just made it easier to avoid paying a penalty.
items.description: It’s a ‘major taxpayer win,’ according to one advocate inside the IRS

items.title: Oil prices extend gains after hours as U.S. forces conduct additional strikes on Iran
items.description: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.

items.title: Investors haven’t been this bullish on the dollar in a decade. How the buck can keep climbing.
items.description: A crowded bet on a stronger U.S. dollar may depend on whether Wednesday’s jump in oil prices proves lasting, as renewed Middle East tensions revive inflation concerns and bolster expectations that the

items.title: This chart shows stamp prices over the years as USPS hikes postage again this weekend
items.description: The new rate will go into effect on July 12, and will be the eighth price increase over the last five calendar years

items.title: The Strait of Hormuz is back under ‘full-conflict conditions’ — and energy markets are scrambling
items.description: Oil prices surge as U.S. and Iran trade strikes; but even without further disruption, volatility appears here to stay for energy markets

items.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
items.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

items.title: Nvidia’s stock trades at a juicy discount, according to BofA
items.description: An analyst recommends investors take advantage of the “enhanced” buying opportunity brought upon by sustained underperformance.
